title: Add Tasks
description: Add Idealista search URLs as tasks for scraping property listings

content.introduction: Add Idealista search URLs to your squid for scraping Spanish property listings. The scraper extracts real estate listings including price, area, bedrooms, contact information, and listing details from Idealista.com search results.

taskFormat.title: Task Format
taskFormat.content: Each task should contain a URL from an Idealista search results page. You can search for properties by location, type, and other filters on Idealista, then use those search URLs as tasks.

supportedUrls.title: Supported URL Formats
supportedUrls.content: The scraper supports Idealista search URLs from various property categories:
list: Filtered searches with price, size, bedrooms, etc.

proTips.content: Apply filters on Idealista (price range, property type, number of bedrooms) before copying the URL to get more targeted results.
Idealista uses different language subdomains. The scraper works with /en/ (English), /es/ (Spanish), and other language versions.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Idealista Listings Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Idealista search URLs as tasks for scraping Spanish property listings including price, area, bedrooms, and contact details.
